overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character traversing a rooftop walkway in a dark, gothic city at night. The scene features dramatic gothic architecture, neon signage, stormy skies, and a large moon illuminating the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway with safety railings

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the rooftop walkway with his cape flowing behind him, moving away from the wall toward the open city view

entered.detail: Tall illuminated gothic spire with pointed arches and detailed stonework visible in the distance ahead
Art deco clock tower with glowing red neon accents and circular clock face
Curved metallic railing running along the right edge of the rooftop walkway
Dark stone building wall running parallel to the walkway on the left side
Tall building with distinctive green neon lighting near the top, visible between other structures

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along an elevated rooftop walkway bordered by a stone wall on the left and metal railing on the right. Ahead, a gothic cathedral spire rises against the stormy night sky, while a red neon clock tower glows prominently to the right. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with mixed lighting from neon signs and ambient moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop overlook with panoramic city skyline view

events.description: Large full moon becomes visible through breaking storm clouds on the left side of the frame
Camera turns slightly right to focus on the red neon clock tower as Batman approaches it

agents.ego_description: Batman continues walking along the rooftop while surveying the cityscape, turning his attention toward the illuminated clock tower ahead

entered.detail: Large bright full moon partially obscured by dramatic storm clouds, casting pale light across the scene
Large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on the right side of the view

segments.scene_description: As Batman continues along the rooftop, the view opens up to reveal a dramatic full moon breaking through storm clouds on the left. The camera turns toward the red neon clock tower which now dominates the center of the frame, while a digital billboard becomes visible on the right. The gothic cathedral spire shifts to the left as the perspective changes, maintaining the dark, neon-lit atmosphere of the gothic city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a high rooftop walkway that shifts from a focused path toward a wide, atmospheric vista of a gothic cityscape. It begins with Batman walking between a stone wall and a metal railing, heading toward a distant cathedral spire under a stormy night sky. As he advances, the perspective opens up to reveal a dramatic full moon breaking through the clouds on the left, while the lighting blends ambient moonlight with the glow of neon signs. The camera then turns to center on a prominent red neon clock tower, allowing the cathedral spire to drift to the periphery as a digital billboard emerges on the right. The scene finally settles into a sweeping view of the dark urban landscape, dominated by the contrast of gothic architecture and vivid neon lights.
